# Authentifactor

> Multi-tenant commerce and web platform powering ambitious brands.

Authentifactor is a digital infrastructure company that architects, designs, and engineers world-class digital products for businesses. We build e-commerce platforms, brand websites, mobile apps, and custom development solutions on a shared multi-tenant architecture.

## Services

- E-Commerce Platforms: Full-featured online stores with inventory, payments (Stripe + Paystack), subscriptions, and multi-warehouse logistics
- Custom Websites & Domains: Bespoke web experiences with custom domains, SSL, editorial layouts, and premium design
- Brand Identity & Design: Custom branding, design systems, and visual identities using our 21st.dev token architecture
- SEO & Digital Growth: Built-in SEO tools, structured data, sitemaps, and analytics strategies
- Mobile Applications: White-label iOS and Android apps with push notifications and deep linking
- Custom Development: Bespoke features, API integrations, webhook pipelines, and technical architecture

## Pricing

- Basic: £49/month — hosting, SSL, monthly updates, email support, up to 100 products
- Standard: £99/month — SEO, subscriptions, webhook automation, priority support, up to 500 products
- Premium: £199/month — unlimited products, custom development (2h/mo), dedicated account manager, 99.9% SLA

## Technology Stack

Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Stripe, Paystack, Vercel, Google Cloud Run, Docker, Framer Motion, Radix UI, Zod, Redis

## Clients

- Taste of Motherland (tmfoods.co.uk) — African food retail
- Styled by Mariam (styledbymaryam.com) — Fashion brand
- Vibrant Minds (vibrantmindsasc.org.uk) — Education platform
- Careceutical — Enterprise clinical management
- CitiesTroves (citiestroves.com) — Serviced apartment booking
- BowSea — Career tech platform
- Clarity Conduct (clarityconduct.com) — Digital agency
